---
title: "Exam Day"
author: "Derek Sollberger"
date: "2026-03-05"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cerulean
---

# SML 201

## Exam One

* Every other seat: leave one seat between you an another student
* Pick up one question packet and one answer packet
* Keep paper packets closed until proctors announce start
* When done/time, turn in both packets and formula sheets to proctors

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library("corrplot")
library("countdown")
library("tidyverse")
```


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
qatarcars <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-12-09/qatarcars.csv')
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
countdown(minutes = 80, seconds = 0)
```


```{r}
#| echo: false
qatarcars |>
  select_if(is.numeric) |>
  select(-c(length, width, height)) |>
  cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs") |>
  corrplot(method = "number", type = "lower")
```
